version_description:
- Pointed get_time_context tool at premier-md endpoint (temporary, until local-md endpoint is deployed)
- Created 32 simulation test cases covering: location component (7), scheduling happy/edge paths (6), identity/branding (2), emergency/callback loop (2), cancel (4), reschedule (2), confirm (1), intent clarification (2), general info (2), other requests (1), cross-flow (2), validation (1)
- Test results: 30/32 passed (94%)
- Known failures:
  1. [General Info] Hours — agent incorrectly mentions Sunday hours from Sunset Park office; conflicts between global prompt (closed Sundays) and knowledge base (Sunset Park open Sundays). Pending multi-office hours resolution.
  2. [Returning] Post-SA cancel — agent refuses to handle cancellation after scheduling in same call; defers to callback. Flow design limitation, not a regression.
analysis_successful_prompt: Evaluate whether the agent had a successful call with the user. For a successful call, the agent should have a complete conversation with user, finished the task, and have not ran into technical issues, or caused user frustration. Besides, the agent was not blocked by a call screen or encountered voicemail.
analysis_summary_prompt: Write a 1-3 sentence summary of the call based on the call transcript. Should capture the important information and actions taken during the call.
analysis_user_sentiment_prompt: Evaluate user's sentiment, mood and satisfaction level.
